response.justification: Over 15 years of progressive full-stack engineering with deep TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS experience across multiple senior roles directly maps to the core stack. Current position at re:cinq explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, satisfying the AI agent requirement that many candidates will lack. Nest.js and Kotlin are absent from the resume, and testing tools listed skew toward D-language frameworks rather than Vitest/Playwright, but the demonstrated testing culture and polyglot adaptability make these learnable gaps rather than disqualifying ones.
strengths: TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB/AWS stack alignment is direct and proven across multiple senior roles
Active AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work at current role satisfies a differentiating requirement
Strong TDD culture evidenced by open-source testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and community workshops
concerns: Nest.js not mentioned anywhere despite being the primary backend framework in the role
Kotlin absent and Java only incidental, leaving the secondary backend language requirement unaddressed
Testing tools cited are D-language specific; no explicit Vitest or Playwright experience listed
